## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature / scenario
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Crypto change (touches `src/crypto/**`)
- [ ] Tooling / CI

## Crypto checklist (only if the PR touches `src/crypto/**`)

- [ ] RFC vector tests still pass (`npm run test`)
- [ ] Added a new vector or property test for the new behavior
- [ ] No new variable-time branches over secret material
- [ ] Reviewed against the rules in [`SECURITY.md`](../SECURITY.md)

## Local checks

- [ ] `npm run ci` passes
- [ ] Manually exercised the affected scenario in `npm run dev`
